summary: Navigated to IssueReporting Power App. M365 authentication completed. Main issues list loaded with 8 existing records. Column headers visible: Title, Status, Priority, Category, Submitted By, Date.
one_liner: IssueReporting app loaded — issues list visible with 8 records and column headers
steps: Observed main issues list with records and column structure

summary: Opened new issue creation form. Filled Title: 'KaneAI Test Issue'. Selected Category: 'Infrastructure'. Filled Description. Submitted form. New record appeared in issues list with status 'Pending'.
one_liner: New issue report created — record appeared in list with status 'Pending'
steps: Activated 'New Issue' action on issues list
Verified new record in issues list

summary: Clicked first issue row. Detail view loaded. Status: 'Active', Priority: 'High', Description: full text visible, Category: 'Safety', Submitted By: 'John Doe'.
one_liner: Detail view showed Status: Active, Priority: High, Description: full text visible
steps: Selected first issue from issues list
Verified Description field: full text visible

summary: Filter control identified. Selected 'Active' status filter. List refreshed showing 4 of 8 records matching 'Active' status. All visible records confirmed as Active.
one_liner: Filter applied — 4 of 8 items shown matching 'Active' status
steps: Verified all 4 visible records have 'Active' status

summary: Navigated to issue detail view. Activated back navigation control. Issues list re-displayed with all 8 original records. Navigation completed without app reload.
one_liner: Back navigation returned to main issues list — 8 records visible
steps: Verified issues list restored with records

summary: Opened existing issue. Activated Edit action. Edit form pre-populated with current values. Changed Title to 'Edited by KaneAI'. Saved. Detail view refreshed showing updated title.
one_liner: Edit saved — title updated to 'Edited by KaneAI'
steps: Edit form loaded with current values
Verified updated title in detail view

summary: Entered 'infrastructure' in search field. List filtered to 2 matching records containing keyword in title. Non-matching records hidden. Search is case-insensitive confirmed.
steps: Verified 2 records shown with keyword in title

summary: Opened new issue creation form. Attempted submit with empty Title, Category, and Description fields. Form did not submit. Three validation messages appeared: one per mandatory field.
one_liner: 3 validation messages displayed for empty mandatory fields: Title, Category, Description
steps: Attempted form submission without filling any fields
Verified validation message for Title field
Verified validation message for Category field
Verified validation message for Description field

summary: Clicked Priority column header. Row order changed — highest priority shown first. Navigated to page 2 using pagination control. Different 8 records displayed. Returned to page 1 to restore original order.
one_liner: Sort changed row order by Priority; page 2 showed 8 different records; page 1 restored
steps: Row order changed to descending priority

summary: Approver-role authentication completed. App presented approver-specific view with pending approvals list. 2 issues in 'Pending Review' status visible. Approve and Reject actions confirmed available for each.
one_liner: Approver view loaded — 2 pending approvals visible; Approve and Reject actions confirmed
